article_meta.title: Politics Here Are The Top 10 Lies Of Liz Cheney And The January 6th Committee By: Tristan Justice January 06, 2025 8 min

reasoning: Strong performance: all flagged items are from the author's own prose, with appropriate and defensible bias labels. No attribution violations. Minor issues include a possibly debatable label (Slant) and missing several additional clear biased phrases present in the long piece.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All highlighted excerpts are clearly the author's narrative, not quoted or attributed to sources.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged excerpt reflects genuine bias (pejorative labeling, sensationalism, opinion-as-fact, flawed logic). One item (Omission of Source Attribution) is somewhat arguable but still defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several clear biased phrases such as 'textbook case of projection,' labeling Hutchinson’s claims as 'hysterical,' and 'quietly corrected,' among others.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are largely appropriate (mudslinging, subjective adjectives, sensationalism, opinion-as-fact, flawed logic). The 'Slant' label could arguably fit better as unsubstantiated claim/opinion-as-fact, but is still defensible.
